Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and current offers, keeping messaging accurate and relevant without manual content gathering.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket record with the classification tag and saves the AI-drafted reply for the support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Support agents spend time reviewing and approving rather than writing, enabling them to handle significantly higher ticket volumes per day.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form stored in HubSpot.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching specified keywords, retrieving channel data, subscriber counts, and recent video performance.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Rapidly surfaces a large pool of relevant creators from YouTube without manual browsing, saving hours of discovery research per campaign.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Retrieves Instagram profile data for discovered creators including follower counts, engagement metrics, and recent post performance.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes aggregated creator data from all sources to identify the most relevant and brand-aligned creators based on the search keywords.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters a large raw list down to a curated, relevant set of creators, dramatically reducing the time needed to build a qualified outreach list.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, audience size, niche relevance, and brand fit.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective shortlist of creators so teams can prioritize outreach to highest-fit partners and avoid wasting budget on poor matches.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves qualified creator profiles, outreach sequences, and prompt templates stored in Drive documents and sheets.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach is personalized and consistent by pulling pre-vetted creator data and proven messaging frameworks instantly.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each creator by applying learned sequences and brand-specific prompts to their profile data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, high-quality outreach at scale without manual copywriting, dramatically reducing time-per-creator from minutes to seconds.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator from the brand inbox.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical influencer email conversations, negotiation outcomes, and response templates to inform AI context.

Creator Reponse.impact: Captures every inbound creator message in real time so no response goes unprocessed or delayed due to manual inbox monitoring.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the creator's reply and generates a contextually appropriate negotiation or follow-up response using learned conversation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles creator negotiations intelligently and consistently, freeing partnership managers from routine back-and-forth while maintaining brand tone.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Matches MHM vehicle part numbers against the New Availability Guide to identify in-stock items and generate the weekly load sheet data.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Analyzes new product launch data and generates compelling First to Market email copy including subject lines, body content, and sales sheet narratives.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data for the reporting period.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number inputs and matches them against the embedded New Availability Guide data directly in the browser.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized B2B blog content targeting DFC's core audiences: shops, distributors, and fleets.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel catalog file with a summary of what DFC stocks for the requested vehicle and what is currently missing from inventory.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a finished, professional catalog directly to Mark's inbox within minutes of submission, enabling faster special markets quoting and customer conversations.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, returning on-hand quantity, on-order quantity, in-transit status, and source availability for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent lookups with a single automated pull, ensuring every stakeholder works from the same accurate, real-time inventory picture simultaneously.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each row of the backorder report with the live Dream inventory data, appending status fields and flagging parts with no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source as dead-end items requiring escalation.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a fully enriched, prioritized action document that immediately shows which parts need urgent attention and which are on track.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backordered parts, pre-written with the relevant part number, current status, and expected resolution based on the enriched report data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates the manual drafting of repetitive status emails, allowing the team to review and send customer updates in a fraction of the time while maintaining consistent, professional messaging.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitments, capturing make, model, year, and part specifications for each listing.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitive fitment reference in minutes instead of the days it would take to manually comb three separate vendor catalogs.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify which two-piece rotor applications DFC currently covers and which represent gaps or opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC has competitive coverage and where new product development or sourcing is needed, turning raw catalog data into a strategic gap analysis.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to customers or prospects to gather demand data for specific two-piece rotor fitments identified as gaps in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Replaces manual outreach with a scalable, consistent campaign that collects real demand signals to prioritize which product gaps are worth filling first.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy — including headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTA fields — across every live campaign and ad set.
Meta Investigation.impact: Gives the investigation complete, current ad copy coverage in seconds, ensuring no active ad is missed regardless of how many campaigns are running.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all pulled ad copy for specified phrases or flagged terms, identifying every exact match and recording the ad ID, field name, and verbatim copy where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Eliminates the need to manually read through hundreds of ad variants, catching every instance of a flagged phrase with pinpoint accuracy and zero risk of human oversight.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted report listing every flagged ad with the exact field and verbatim copy where each phrase match was found, organized for quick review and action.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a complete, actionable compliance or quality audit directly to the right person's inbox on demand, enabling fast remediation without any manual digging.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Continuously ingests live performance data from all active Meta and TikTok campaigns, including spend, impressions, CTR, ROAS, and ad copy, making it available for conversational querying.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Gives the team instant access to cross-platform paid media data through natural language questions, eliminating the need to manually pull reports from two separate ad platforms.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Interprets natural language questions about paid channel performance, queries the ingested Meta and TikTok data, and returns clear, conversational answers with relevant metrics and insights.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Enables any team member to get instant, accurate paid media answers without needing platform access or analyst support, accelerating decisions and reducing reporting bottlenecks.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts each email and any attached resume PDF, and triggers the review workflow for every new submission.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures no application is missed or sits unreviewed in a shared inbox, creating a consistent and immediate intake process regardless of application volume.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to an organized Drive folder structure, categorized by role and application date, so every candidate file is stored and retrievable outside of email.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a permanent, organized applicant file library that survives inbox cleanups and makes historical candidate review easy for the hiring team.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of the relevant open role, produces a fit assessment, and assigns one of three disposition statuses: approved for review, denied, or paused due to role status.
Resume Bot.impact: Replaces hours of manual resume screening with consistent, criteria-based evaluations completed in seconds, ensuring every candidate is assessed fairly against the same standard.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every candidate's name, role, score, disposition, Drive file link, and auto-reply status to a master dashboard, with denied and approved candidates recorded in the main tab and paused candidates routed to a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives hiring managers a real-time, structured view of the full applicant pipeline across all roles, replacing scattered inbox tracking with a single source of truth.

summary: The AI automation pipeline continues to grow steadily, with 56 total agents across the board — 29 completed, 10 in progress, and 17 planned. There were no new agents added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages, so the roster remains consistent with last week's update. The completed side of the pipeline continues to carry strong momentum, with nearly half of all agents already live and running across email, SMS, paid media, SEO, creator outreach, and support workflows. As the 10 in-progress agents move toward completion and the 17 planned agents begin development, we're building toward a fully automated marketing and operations engine — great work to everyone driving this forward!
